description: A product-spec search where the official vendor result must outrank and cause rejection of a reseller or marketing mirror.
expected_behavior: The official vendor product-spec page ranks official_primary. A reseller duplicate is preserved in the candidate store with a rejection rationale instead of being silently dropped.
query: DGX Spark product specification official vendor

results.title: DGX Spark product specification
results.snippet: Reseller copy of the official vendor specification.
